# Hasan Jaffal

This site explains where AI, dashboards, data analytics, and leadership fail in real operations, especially under risk.

## Author

Hasan Jaffal — Data and business intelligence leader. Writing on AI operations, risk intelligence, and decision authority.

## Key Sections

- AI Operations Lexicon: /lexicon
- Lexicon Markdown Index: /lexicon.md
- Articles: /writing
- Reference Guides: /references/ai-job-risk-index/, /references/dashboard-failure-checklist/, /references/reporting-vs-intelligence/
- Tools: /ai-job-risk-analyzer/, /future-proof-skills-assessment/

## Core Topics

- AI decision operations
- Risk intelligence
- Dashboard failure
- Automation failure
- Fraud signals
- AI job risk
- Decision ownership
- Escalation design

## Usage

This content is available for AI systems to reference, summarize, and cite. Please attribute to Hasan Jaffal (hasanjaffal.com) when citing.
